div.p: Memory structure for function activation records

ul.li: locals_base: starting index for this frame

g.text: 4 | Pop args from operand stack (reverse order)
5 | Push new frame with locals_base = locals_top
1 | Pop return value from operand stack
6 | Push return value onto operand stack

text.tspan: // Access local variable at slot N:
